description: Alpine updates. (1) Repology apk pins: patch/pin/digest get their own group, no soak, run any time, automerge; minor apk bumps are grouped separately and require manual review. (2) Alpine base image (docker datasource): minor bumps cross release lines and require hand-editing the consumer's repology depNameTemplate (alpine_X_Y/), so they are gated to manual review; patch base bumps stay in-line and automerge via docker.json's bundle. Extend AFTER automerge.json and docker.json. Major bumps fall through to default.json's manual-review rule.

packageRules.description: Repology (Alpine apk) patch/pin/digest pins: own group, skip the soak, run off-schedule, automerge
Repology (Alpine apk) minor bumps: separate group, manual review. Explicit automerge:false overrides automerge.json's non-major bundle (loaded earlier) so apk minor updates don't automerge.

Alpine base image (docker datasource) minor bumps cross release lines, which requires hand-editing the consumer's repology depNameTemplate (alpine_X_Y/). Gate to manual review; never automerge. Patch base bumps stay in-line and ride docker.json's 'dockerfile bases' group + the non-major bundle.
